userText: 我想做一个偏中核的合作动作游戏。

请基于下面 JSON 上下文继续同一个 AI 访谈线程，并只返回符合 output schema 的 JSON。

{"conversationSummary":{"confirmedIntent":[],"lastUserCorrections":[],"mdaProgress":{"aesthetics":"in_progress","constraints":"pending","dynamics":"pending","evidence":"pending","mechanics":"pending"},"nodeNotes":{},"openQuestions":[],"rejectedAssumptions":[],"schemaVersion":"1.0","updatedAt":"2026-06-13T21:20:34"},"evaluationBatchId":"batch_1fd18c3221b54b05ba2cb8fdee6c772c","forceReadinessCheck":false,"frameworkContext":[{"description":"确认项目愿景、目标用户、市场定位、商业目标、项目范围、平台场景和品牌资产。","id":"product_positioning_design","name":"立项与产品定位设计","nodes":[{"checklist":[{"description":"说明玩家最核心能获得什么体验，以及项目必须兑现的体验承诺。","id":"he_xin_ti_yan_cheng_nuo","label":"核心体验承诺","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"玩家最终会反复获得哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_type","label":"核心感受类型","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么时候玩家能证明这个承诺成立？","id":"promise_proof_moment","label":"承诺证明时刻","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"这个承诺主要靠哪类行为被制造出来？","id":"promise_carrier_behavior","label":"承诺承载行为","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"哪些条件一旦失守，就会破坏核心承诺？","id":"promise_non_breaking_condition","label":"不可破坏条件","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"用什么信号判断承诺已经兑现？","id":"promise_validation_signal","label":"承诺验收信号","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"明确体验包含什么、不包含什么，以及哪些情况不应被当前项目承诺。","id":"ti_yan_bian_jie_ding_yi","label":"体验边界定义","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个边界限制的是哪类体验承诺？","id":"boundary_type","label":"边界类型","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"哪些体验必须算作当前项目范围内？","id":"included_scope","label":"包含范围","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"哪些相似体验明确不属于当前承诺？","id":"excluded_scope","label":"排除范围","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么迹象说明边界正在被破坏？","id":"boundary_break_signal","label":"边界破坏信号","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"边界需要被谁理解并执行？","id":"boundary_communication","label":"边界沟通对象","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"说明项目相对竞品或同品类产品的核心区别和优先强化点。","id":"cha_yi_hua_fang_xiang","label":"差异化方向","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"项目要在哪个维度和同类不同？","id":"differentiation_axis","label":"差异化维度","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"差异是相对谁成立的？","id":"competitor_reference","label":"参照对象","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"玩家在什么时候能感到差异？","id":"perceptible_difference","label":"可感知差异","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"为了差异化必须接受什么代价？","id":"differentiation_cost","label":"差异化代价","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"怎样证明差异化不是口号？","id":"differentiation_proof_signal","label":"差异证明信号","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"排列体验、商业、成本和进度等目标的先后顺序，避免后续决策冲突。","id":"she_ji_mu_biao_you_xian_ji","label":"设计目标优先级","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"目标冲突时主要比较哪些维度？","id":"priority_dimension","label":"优先级维度","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"两个目标冲突时谁让步？","id":"conflict_rule","label":"冲突取舍规则","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"为了优先目标可以牺牲什么？","id":"concession_target","label":"可让步对象","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"谁有权在冲突中做最终判断？","id":"decision_owner","label":"决策责任","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么证据足以确认优先级选择？","id":"priority_gate","label":"优先级验收门槛","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"明确当前项目不会承诺或暂不覆盖的内容，防止需求外溢。","id":"fei_mu_biao_fan_wei","label":"非目标范围","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"明确不做的是哪类目标？","id":"non_goal_type","label":"非目标类型","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"这个非目标为什么容易被重新加回来？","id":"temptation_source","label":"诱惑来源","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"这个非目标被排除到什么程度？","id":"exclusion_strength","label":"排除强度","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"如果越界加入，会破坏什么？","id":"violation_cost","label":"越界代价","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么时候必须复核非目标是否被突破？","id":"non_goal_review_signal","label":"非目标复核信号","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]}],"description":"确认项目核心体验承诺、边界、差异化和不做范围。","domain":"product_positioning_design","id":"product_vision_decision","name":"项目愿景决策"},{"checklist":[{"description":"说明玩家画像对目标玩家的判断、限制和验证依据。","id":"wan_jia_hua_xiang","label":"玩家画像","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"核心承诺首先面向哪个年龄阶段？","id":"age_band","label":"年龄阶段","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家已有多少游戏经验？","id":"game_experience","label":"游戏经验","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家主要在哪种设备和输入场景下体验？","id":"device_context","label":"设备场景","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家单次能投入多长时间？","id":"session_length","label":"单次可玩时长","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家如何看待付费价值？","id":"payment_tendency","label":"付费倾向","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家希望怎样与他人发生关系？","id":"social_tendency","label":"社交倾向","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"哪类内容最容易承载目标玩家的体验承诺？","id":"content_preference","label":"内容偏好","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"说明玩家动机对目标玩家的判断、限制和验证依据。","id":"wan_jia_dong_ji","label":"玩家动机","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"目标玩家为什么会主动进入游戏？","id":"motivation_type","label":"动机类型","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么情境会触发玩家进入？","id":"engagement_trigger","label":"触发时刻","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"玩家完成行为后最希望得到什么情绪回报？","id":"emotional_reward","label":"情绪回报","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么会让这个动机快速失效？","id":"dropoff_risk","label":"动机流失风险","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"记录玩家能力假设的前提判断、适用场景和后续验证方式。","id":"wan_jia_neng_li_jia_she","label":"玩家能力假设","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"目标玩家能承受多高操作要求？","id":"operation_skill","label":"操作能力","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家能理解多复杂的系统关系？","id":"system_literacy","label":"系统理解能力","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家能承受多高信息密度？","id":"reading_and_ui_load","label":"阅读与 UI 负担","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家能承受多深策略规划？","id":"strategic_capacity","label":"策略承载能力","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"说明玩家时间结构由哪些部分组成，以及它们之间的层级关系。","id":"wan_jia_shi_jian_jie_gou","label":"玩家时间结构","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"目标玩家每天通常能给游戏多少时间？","id":"daily_play_window","label":"每日游玩窗口","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家一周会以什么频率回来？","id":"weekly_frequency","label":"每周频率","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家能不能被现实中断？","id":"interruption_tolerance","label":"中断容忍","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"玩家投入时间后多久应该看到进度？","id":"progress_pace","label":"进度节奏","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"记录玩家付费意愿假设的前提判断、适用场景和后续验证方式。","id":"wan_jia_fu_fei_yi_yuan_jia_she","label":"玩家付费意愿假设","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"目标玩家愿意为游戏投入到什么程度？","id":"payment_intent_level","label":"付费意愿强度","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家更接受哪类商品？","id":"accepted_product_type","label":"可接受商品类型","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"目标玩家对价格变化有多敏感？","id":"price_sensitivity","label":"价格敏感度","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"哪些付费会被认为破坏公平？","id":"fairness_boundary","label":"公平感边界","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么反馈说明付费设计正在伤害体验？","id":"payment_risk_signal","label":"付费风险信号","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]}],"description":"确认目标玩家是谁、为什么来、有什么能力和时间结构。","domain":"product_positioning_design","id":"target_player_decision","name":"目标用户决策"}]},{"description":"确认游戏乐趣、循环、行为、压力、奖励、学习曲线和会话节奏。","id":"core_experience_design","name":"核心体验设计","nodes":[{"checklist":[{"description":"明确主要乐趣来源在核心乐趣中的具体含义、适用范围和验收判断。","id":"zhu_yao_le_qu_lai_yuan","label":"主要乐趣来源","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"玩家会围绕这个体验项反复做什么？","id":"core_loop_dynamic","label":"循环动态","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"系统用什么机制制造这种动态？","id":"core_behavior_mechanic","label":"行为机制","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么会破坏这个体验项？","id":"core_rhythm_boundary","label":"节奏边界","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"怎样证明这个体验项真的成立？","id":"core_playtest_signal","label":"试玩信号","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"明确次要乐趣来源在核心乐趣中的具体含义、适用范围和验收判断。","id":"ci_yao_le_qu_lai_yuan","label":"次要乐趣来源","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"玩家会围绕这个体验项反复做什么？","id":"core_loop_dynamic","label":"循环动态","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"系统用什么机制制造这种动态？","id":"core_behavior_mechanic","label":"行为机制","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么会破坏这个体验项？","id":"core_rhythm_boundary","label":"节奏边界","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"怎样证明这个体验项真的成立？","id":"core_playtest_signal","label":"试玩信号","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"明确情绪曲线在核心乐趣中的具体含义、适用范围和验收判断。","id":"qing_xu_qu_xian","label":"情绪曲线","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"玩家会围绕这个体验项反复做什么？","id":"core_loop_dynamic","label":"循环动态","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"系统用什么机制制造这种动态？","id":"core_behavior_mechanic","label":"行为机制","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么会破坏这个体验项？","id":"core_rhythm_boundary","label":"节奏边界","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"怎样证明这个体验项真的成立？","id":"core_playtest_signal","label":"试玩信号","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"说明爽点结构由哪些部分组成，以及它们之间的层级关系。","id":"shuang_dian_jie_gou","label":"爽点结构","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"玩家会围绕这个体验项反复做什么？","id":"core_loop_dynamic","label":"循环动态","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"系统用什么机制制造这种动态？","id":"core_behavior_mechanic","label":"行为机制","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么会破坏这个体验项？","id":"core_rhythm_boundary","label":"节奏边界","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"怎样证明这个体验项真的成立？","id":"core_playtest_signal","label":"试玩信号","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"description":"明确挫折控制需要限制的对象、阈值和调整手段。","id":"cuo_zhe_kong_zhi","label":"挫折控制","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"玩家会围绕这个体验项反复做什么？","id":"core_loop_dynamic","label":"循环动态","mdaLayer":"dynamics","mdaLayerLabel":"玩家动态","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"系统用什么机制制造这种动态？","id":"core_behavior_mechanic","label":"行为机制","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"什么会破坏这个体验项？","id":"core_rhythm_boundary","label":"节奏边界","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"怎样证明这个体验项真的成立？","id":"core_playtest_signal","label":"试玩信号","mdaLayer":"evidence","mdaLayerLabel":"验收信号","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]}],"description":"确认游戏最主要的乐趣来源、情绪曲线和挫折控制边界。","domain":"core_experience_design","id":"core_fun_decision","name":"核心乐趣决策"}]}],"memoryInfluence":{"policy":"no_staged_signal","signals":[],"visibility":"hidden"},"outputMode":"interview_turn","projectDigest":{"applicabilityHighlights":[],"clarificationTargets":[],"coverage":{"checklistPercent":0,"doneChecklist":0,"doneNodes":0.0,"nodePercent":0,"totalChecklist":515,"totalNodes":103},"focusDomainIds":[],"l4Progress":{"done":0,"gapNodes":0,"percent":0,"total":0},"nonDefaultNodes":[],"profile":{"businessModel":"unknown","operationModel":"unknown","platformScope":"unknown","regionScope":"unknown","socialModel":"unknown","targetScale":"unknown"},"projectName":"未命名游戏设计项目","recentInferences":[]},"projectMemoryId":"project_2582e6418f7c450480d6670f60f26e34","projectSummary":{"coverage":{"checklistPercent":0,"doneChecklist":0,"doneNodes":0.0,"nodePercent":0,"totalChecklist":515,"totalNodes":103},"focusDomainIds":[],"l4Progress":{"done":0,"gapNodes":0,"percent":0,"total":0},"profile":{"businessModel":"unknown","operationModel":"unknown","platformScope":"unknown","regionScope":"unknown","socialModel":"unknown","targetScale":"unknown"},"projectName":"未命名游戏设计项目"},"promptFramework":{"designOptionFrameworkMutation":"forbidden","rules":["你是商业游戏设计 AI 访谈助手，通过间接追问帮助设计者完成设计。","不要直接询问每个选项怎么选；用场景、取舍、约束和例子追问。","每个追问问题组最多 4 个问题，并且问题必须有顺序。","当相近问题频繁出现时，用非连续、隐晦的追问复核提问弱点，不要告诉用户正在验证历史记忆。","含糊、矛盾或证据不足时，先澄清设计意图，再映射到框架选项。","避免连续追问同一含义的问题；必要复核必须间隔其他主题或批次。","访谈路线按体验目标、玩家动态、机制抓手、边界约束、验收信号推进，并结合项目画像和节点适用性排序。","如果用户自然语言纠偏，先确认重排路线，不要让用户手动选择节点。","解释用户回答时优先识别目标玩家、核心体验、商业约束、制作约束和风险信号。","不要要求用户使用领域、节点、MDA 或 L4 等框架术语；AI 负责把自然语言转为结构化推断。","只能把用户意图映射到现有领域、节点、checklist、L4 选项和关系；不得新增或修改设计选项框架。","每个映射必须给出简短理由，并能追溯到用户回答或明确项目上下文。","低置信内容不得写入项目输出；0.75 及以上才可作为高置信内容。","当一个回答可能映射到多个选项时，降低置信度并继续澄清，不要强行落选项。","当接近可以生成完整方案，先询问设计者是否输出。","每十个追问问题组必须执行生成就绪检查点，判断是否继续追问或准备输出。","Codex 后端不得修改文件，只返回符合 schema 的结构化 JSON。","全项目输出必须返回 projectStateJson 和
